channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-02-26 01:23 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Exactly. It would be the end of democracy in America.
item.description: Exactly. It would be the end of democracy in America.

item.title: @elonmusk: Last night, Democrats couldn't even stand to support putting Americans first. It was nuts to watch! ...
item.description: Last night, Democrats couldn't even stand to support putting Americans first. It was nuts to watch! No wonder they’re opposed to the SAVE America Act! They want illegal aliens to vote in our elections because they’re a party that proudly puts illegals first and YOU LAST. We cannot stand for this! Putting America first isn’t a partisan issue — it simply means we prioritize what benefits the AMERICAN PEOPLE and keeps them safe. I can’t believe it’s come to this. We MUST pass the SAVE America Act and make sure every elected official stands for U.S. citizens' best interests, not illegal aliens.

item.title: @elonmusk: Excellent, comprehensive analysis of how the Senate can—and must—pass the SAVE America Act
item.description: Excellent, comprehensive analysis of how the Senate can—and must—pass the SAVE America Act

item.title: @elonmusk: Wait, so the founder of Anthropic is "Amodei," as in "loves god"? And he leads Anthropic, meaning "h...
item.description: Wait, so the founder of Anthropic is "Amodei," as in "loves god"? And he leads Anthropic, meaning "human-centered," which is being used in military strikes? And the creator of ChatGPT is "Altman," as in "an alternative to humans"? And he leads OpenAI, which is completely closed? And then there's "Gemini," meaning "two-faced," from a company that promised to do no evil? And the whole global AI arms race is being driven by people who claimed to be worried about AGI taking over the world? Either the universe is an extremely cliché writer, or has a brilliant sense of humor

item.title: @elonmusk: Requiring senators to speak during a filibuster doesn’t nuke the filibuster It lets the filibuster b...
item.description: Requiring senators to speak during a filibuster doesn’t nuke the filibuster It lets the filibuster be what a filibuster is—namely, speaking on the Senate floor

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨FYI: Gavin Newsom has already signed California Assembly Bill 1043 which mandates that operating sy...
item.description: 🚨FYI: Gavin Newsom has already signed California Assembly Bill 1043 which mandates that operating systems including Windows, Linux, macOS, and FreeBSD implement system-level age (identity) verification. This takes effect on January 1st, 2027. Colorado also has a similar act called SB26-051 which is currently advancing through the committees and ready for full Senate consideration. It would come into effect on January 1st, 2028 if passed. Utah, Texas, Louisiana, and Alabama all currently have app layer verification laws, but not OS level YET. So OS level verification isn't a future thing. It's happening now. They are chokepointing the internet. Enjoy these days.

item.title: @elonmusk: NEWS: xAI's Grok 4.20 beta1 has debuted at #1 on the Search Arena leaderboard, scoring 1226 in blind...
item.description: NEWS: xAI's Grok 4.20 beta1 has debuted at #1 on the Search Arena leaderboard, scoring 1226 in blind pairwise human voting and outranking GPT-5.2 (1219) and Gemini-3. The model also ranks #4 overall in Text Arena with a score of 1492, on par with Gemini 3.1 Pro. Results are preliminary, based on approximately 4,000 head-to-head votes.arena.ai

item.title: @elonmusk: it's not asylum if you use taxpayer dollars to vacation in the place you fled
item.description: it's not asylum if you use taxpayer dollars to vacation in the place you fled

item.title: @elonmusk: Can men become women? ChatGPT says yes. Gemini says it depends and hints at gender pseudoscience. On...
item.description: Can men become women? ChatGPT says yes. Gemini says it depends and hints at gender pseudoscience. Only Grok 4.20 correctly answers no.

item.title: @elonmusk: Ten men, every single one of Pakistani migrant background, were convicted today in a British court f...
item.description: Ten men, every single one of Pakistani migrant background, were convicted today in a British court for attempting to murder a mother and her 13-year-old daughter by petrol-bombing their Stoke-on-Trent home in 2021. The gang demanded one man, then doused the house in petrol and set the mother on fire in front of her child. The 31-year-old mother suffered 65% burns and was in a two-month coma. The 13-year old girl suffered 15% burns. Both forced to jump from a first-floor window. This wasn’t “youths” or “Asians”. The perpetrators were identified as Shakil Uddin, Lukman Khan, Riyadh Iqbal, Muhammad Sufyaan-Shah, Tayyeb Majeed, Ali Abbas, Haris Mahmood, Naveed Hussain, Kashif & Bilal Ahmed.

item.title: @elonmusk: I have made the decision to join Restore Britain. I believe that this is the only movement at the mo...
item.description: I have made the decision to join Restore Britain. I believe that this is the only movement at the moment with serious credibility, a truly patriotic approach, and based solutions! I'm looking forward to the next chapter of my journey. We must@RestoreBritain_

item.title: @elonmusk: Model Y wins the EV of the year in NZ 🇳🇿autotrader.co.nz/news/2025-n…
item.description: Model Y wins the EV of the year in NZ 🇳🇿autotrader.co.nz/news/2025-n…

item.title: @elonmusk: Great news! Now it is time to enforce the talking filibuster. The filibuster rule is meant to allow ...
item.description: Great news! Now it is time to enforce the talking filibuster. The filibuster rule is meant to allow senators to present their arguments before a bill is passed. It is NOT intended to require 60 votes to pass anything at all! STOP THE ABUSE OF THE FILIBUSTER NOW. Either senators must talk or they must pass the bill to SAVE AMERICA!
